title: The Sleepy Little Koala
content: Once upon a time, deep in the quiet eucalyptus forests of Australia, lived a small koala named Kiki. While all the other animals were awake playing, Kiki loved to watch the silver moon rise...

title: The Star That Forgot How to Shine
content: High up in the midnight sky, there was a tiny silver star named Twinkle. Tonight, Twinkle felt a bit tired, and her glow was dim. But her friend Mr. Moon whispered a secret into the evening breeze...

title: The Brave Little Kangaroo
content: Joey was a tiny kangaroo with huge boots and an even bigger heart. Tonight, he was going on a grand quest across the grassy plains to find the legendary blanket of sweet dreams...
